task: 502 status grace + Enchant Stones/Totems white labels
rootCause: Transient upload/proxy 502 on tracker_status called applyUploadSyncFailure (markTrackerSyncMissed), flipping lastStatus red. deriveTrackerUploadAccountStatus then kept statusColor red even when lastSuccessfulUploadAt/heartbeat remained inside the offline grace window. get-backpack also exposed accountOnline/currentStatus from upload statusColor instead of account presence.

fixSummary.server502Handling: Transient 502/5xx failures use applyTransientUploadFailure — preserve lastStatus, record server_502_upload_retrying, refresh heartbeat timestamps.
fixSummary.statusDerivation: Within grace, recover green/yellow from transient red when prior snapshot success exists; beyond grace use upload_interval_missed / account_offline_timeout (presence).
fixSummary.apiFields: get-backpack/account-status use accountPresenceLive for accountOnline/currentStatus; uploadWarningReason surfaces server 502 separately.
